summary: Iteration 39 - OTP 2-Step Flow Frontend Testing. Verified all 4 OTP forms have the correct 2-step flow: (1) Mobile input + Send OTP button, (2) OTP input + Verify button + Change Number + Resend countdown. Tests passed for 3 out of 4 forms. Lead Capture Page (/leads) route does not exist.

integration_issues.issue: Route /leads does not exist. LeadCapturePage component exists in App.js (lines 2387-2800) but is not exposed as a route. Only LeadCapturePopup (inactivity/exit-intent popup) is used.

action_items: OPTIONAL: If /leads route is needed, add route: <Route path="/leads" element={<LeadCapturePage />} /> to App.js routes section
critical_code_review_comments: LeadCapturePage component is defined (lines 2387-2800) but not exposed as a public route. This may be intentional as LeadCapturePopup is used instead for lead capture via inactivity/exit-intent triggers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All OTP 2-step flows are working correctly for: Homepage Inquiry Form (/#inquiry-form), Admin Login (/admin/login), Staff Login (/staff/login). The LeadCapturePage component exists but is not exposed as /leads route - only LeadCapturePopup (popup) is active.

lead_capture_page.notes: LeadCapturePage component exists in App.js but no public route defined. LeadCapturePopup is used instead for lead capture.
